events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes a crew using a field method for equipment safety that is less tidy than the preferred shop approach but still matches product instructions and project requirements. No local amendment or drawing note forbids it. Reference material is OSHA 1926 Subpart O (Machinery and Mechanized Equipment).

Since the method matches listed product instructions and project requirements, and nothing forbids it, this should be a pass. Risk is low. Work stage is in-progress. No component conditions flagged.
